system.description: When you borrow some of the steading's assets for an expedition (like the horses or a plow), roll +Fortunes: on a 10+, go ahead, but bring it back safely; on a 7-9, you'll need to do some convincing; on a 6-, don't mark XP—you can take the asset with you if you want, but if you do, reduce Fortunes by 1.

success.value: Go ahead, but bring it back safely.

partial.value: You'll need to do some convincing.

failure.value: Don't mark XP. You can take the asset with you if you want, but if you do, reduce Fortunes by 1.
